raw: {"questions":[{"label":"Refactor aftermath","name":"How did the payments refactor land for you after it shipped?","description":"Surfaces whether the recent win actually felt rewarding or just like another delivery.","purpose":"topic","axis_effects":[{"axis":"wellbeing","delta":1},{"axis":"engagement","delta":1}]},{"label":"Recognition fit","name":"What part of the team's reaction felt most real to you?","description":"Checks whether recognition matched their own sense of contribution.","purpose":"topic","axis_effects":[{"axis":"engagement","delta":1},{"axis":"wellbeing","delta":1}]},{"label":"Quiet signals","name":"I've noticed you've been quieter in standup this week — what's going on underneath that?","description":"Gently probes the reason behind the recent drop in visible energy.","purpose":"wellbeing","axis_effects":[{"axis":"wellbeing","delta":3},{"axis":"engagement","delta":1}]},{"label":"Sustainable pace","name":"What would make this week feel sustainable for you?","description":"Looks for concrete conditions that would support recovery and steady output.","purpose":"wellbeing","axis_effects":[{"axis":"wellbeing","delta":3},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]},{"label":"Mentoring shape","name":"What kind of mentoring would actually fit into your week?","description":"Makes the mentoring interest concrete by surfacing real time and context constraints.","purpose":"topic","axis_effects":[{"axis":"growth","delta":3},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]},{"label":"Mentoring tradeoff","name":"What would you need to drop to make room for mentoring?","description":"Forces a trade-off between development work and current responsibilities.","purpose":"competency","axis_effects":[{"axis":"growth","delta":3},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]},{"label":"Rewrite role","name":"What role would make sense for you in the billing rewrite?","description":"Clarifies how they might best fit into the upcoming rewrite without assuming enthusiasm or resistance.","purpose":"topic","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3},{"axis":"growth","delta":1}]},{"label":"Rewrite risk","name":"Where do you expect the billing rewrite to get difficult?","description":"Surfaces anticipated technical or coordination risks before the work starts.","purpose":"competency","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":1},{"axis":"growth","delta":1}]},{"label":"Need to know","name":"What do you need to know before the billing rewrite starts?","description":"Checks for missing context, expectations, or decisions that would affect readiness.","purpose":"topic","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3}]},{"label":"Blocker ownership","name":"What are you waiting on that could quietly stall you?","description":"Identifies dependencies that are not yet being escalated or managed.","purpose":"topic","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3},{"axis":"engagement","delta":1}]},{"label":"Stretch edge","name":"What part of your work right now feels most like a stretch?","description":"Finds where they are learning, overextended, or under-challenged in a concrete way.","purpose":"competency","axis_effects":[{"axis":"growth","delta":3},{"axis":"wellbeing","delta":1}]},{"label":"Next skill","name":"What skill do you want to sharpen over the next quarter?","description":"Opens a practical growth conversation tied to the upcoming work cycle.","purpose":"competency","axis_effects":[{"axis":"growth","delta":3},{"axis":"engagement","delta":1}]}]}
